channel.title: GitHub GDScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of GDScript in GitHub

item.title: bitbrain/pandora
item.description: Godot 4 addon for RPG data management such items, inventories, spells, mobs, quests and NPCs.

item.title: bitwes/Gut
item.description: Godot Unit Test. Unit testing tool for Godot Game Engine.

item.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
item.description: Unleash your creativity with Pixelorama, a powerful and accessible open-source pixel art multitool. Whether you want to create sprites, tiles, animations, or just express yourself in the language of pixel art, this software will realize your pixel-perfect dreams with a vast toolbox of features. Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

item.title: maktoobgar/scene_manager
item.description: A tool to manage, organize and ease transitions between different scenes.

item.title: bitbrain/beehave
item.description: 🐝 behavior tree AI for Godot Engine

item.title: KoBeWi/Metroidvania-System
item.description: General-purpose framework for creating metroidvania games in Godot.

item.title: nathanhoad/godot_dialogue_manager
item.description: A powerful nonlinear dialogue system for Godot

item.title: Alexofp/BDCC
item.description: Text based game about being a prisoner in a space prison with a lot of adult themes. Working title is Broken Dreams Correctional Center or BDCC for short. Test the latest version here: (could be unstable)

item.title: Maaack/Godot-Game-Template
item.description: Godot template with a main menu, options menus, pause menu, credits, scene loader, extra tools, and an example game scene.

item.title: lampe-games/godot-open-rts
item.description: Open Source RTS game made in Godot 4

item.title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

item.title: mbrlabs/Lorien
item.description: Infinite canvas drawing/whiteboarding app for Windows, Linux and macOS. Made with Godot.

item.title: dreadpon/godot_spatial_gardener
item.description: A Godot plugin for painting plants and props on arbitrary 3D surfaces implemented in GDScript
